{{Infobox construct
| name = Elder wall
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Elder wall]] of flesh surrounds [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s quarters.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Elder wall]] is a mountain of flesh that lashes out at [[Guards]] and [[Watchmen]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Elder wall]] has been in [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s chambers since before [[Jerri]] left the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
